calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for Nicola Panarelli, Administrator (via Zoom).
Angie Lam for American Research Bureau, Assignee (via Zoom).
Douglas Applegate for Fraser & Fraser, Assignee (via Zoom).

The court found that the request for distribution to the Controller's Office, should a small estate affidavit not be filed within 120 days, was reasonable. Mr. Wrobel confirmed the same approach should be applied in the Estate of Frank Anthony Lopez Jr. Mr. Applegate noted that he had filed proof of heirship for the successors-in-interest and clarified that his primary interest was in Stella Panarelli. He stated that her family had located a holographic will in Italy and that a small estate affidavit should be ready in approximately two weeks.

No objections were raised as to Mr. Wrobel's request for extraordinary fees. There being no objections, the court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Nicola Panarelli.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Legacy Probate International.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.

Mr. Applegate stated that he takes responsibility for the mathematical errors. The Amended Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of the Estate is under submission. Status on close of the estate is off calendar. The court will set a new status on close date in the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.

The court stated that this cannot be done in this county because the death of Charles Madrid occurred in Colorado and that this court has no jurisdiction. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death is off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates.
Jeanie Sandoval appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that Mr. Wrobel is not present and that he filed a request for a 90-day continuance. Mrs. Rahim stated that she has no objections to a continuance and that she is working with Mr. Wrobel to work on the issues. Mr. Applegate does not object to a continuance. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate, and status on close of estate are continued to April 15, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Nicola Panarelli (petitioner)
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates (objector/interested party).
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.

Discussion was held and all parties agreed to a continuance to take care of the unresolved issues. Petition to determine persons entitled to distribution of estate and Status on close of estate are continued to January 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Barrett: Not reported.

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Nicola Panarelli (petitioner)
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Kemp & Associates (objector/interested party).
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for American Research Bureau.

Mr. Wrobel stated that he filed a declaration in response to the examiner's notes on July 11, 2023 and requested a continuance to file a supplement to the declaration to address all of the additional issues. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of the Estate, and status on close of estate are continued to October 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court stated that it wants to make sure that all of the remote appearance information is provided.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
